description_long: This is a thick, hardcover book with a predominantly white cover and a geometric design on the front. The cover features a central diamond-shaped window revealing a decorative wooden parquet pattern beneath, bordered by a subtle gray triangular motif. The book's edges are crisp and the spine is rounded, giving it a sturdy and professional appearance. The title is printed in bold, dark letters at the top of the front cover. The book appears to be of substantial size, likely a catalog or reference volume, and the overall finish is smooth and slightly glossy. There is a small, colorful logo on the lower part of the spine.
description: A thick, white hardcover book with a geometric design and parquet pattern on the front cover, featuring bold title text and a small logo on the spine.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing the diamond-shaped parquet design and the bold title at the top.
description_view_1: The book is seen from a lower angle, highlighting the thickness and the clean, white edges of the cover.
description_view_2: The back cover and spine are partially visible, with the title text appearing upside down and the rounded spine edge prominent.
description_view_3: The spine is fully visible, displaying a small, colorful logo at the bottom and the title text running vertically.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration is a geometric design featuring a diamond-shaped window that reveals a detailed wooden parquet pattern, bordered by a subtle gray triangular motif. The style is clean and modern, with a focus on texture and symmetry.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is white with the title text running vertically in dark letters. A small, colorful logo is present at the bottom of the spine, adding a touch of color to the otherwise minimalist design.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small, colorful logo is visible at the bottom of the spine, featuring multiple colors in a compact design.
